sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17509" key="au)o/kwlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐόκωλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n17509.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">withered of limb,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:7:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.76</biblScope> </bibl> (prob. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐτόκ-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
